source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A cylindrical glass rod (figure) has index of refraction 1.52. It is surrounded by water that has index of refraction of 1.33. One end is ground to a hemispherical surface. A small object is placed on the axis of the rod to the left of the vertex. Find the lateral magnification.
